direclaw.desc: Has a 30% chance to cause the target to either fall asleep, become poisoned, or become paralyzed.
direclaw.shortDesc: 30% chance to sleep, poison, or paralyze target.

ironhead.desc: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.
ironhead.shortDesc: 20% chance to make the target flinch.

moonblast.desc: Has a 10% chance to lower the target's Special Attack by 1 stage.
moonblast.shortDesc: 10% chance to lower the target's Sp. Atk by 1.

saltcure.desc: Causes damage to the target equal to 1/16 of its maximum HP (1/8 if the target is Steel or Water type), rounded down, at the end of each turn during effect. This effect ends when the target is no longer active.
saltcure.shortDesc: Deals 1/16 max HP each turn; 1/8 on Steel, Water.

toxicthread.desc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages and poisons it.
toxicthread.shortDesc: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 and poisons it.

healer.desc: 50% chance this Pokemon's ally has its non-volatile status condition cured at the end of each turn.
healer.shortDesc: 50% chance this Pokemon's ally has its status cured at the end of each turn.

shedskin.desc: This Pokemon has a 30% chance to have its non-volatile status condition cured at the end of each turn.
shedskin.shortDesc: This Pokemon has a 30% chance to have its status cured at the end of each turn.

unseenfist.shortDesc: This Pokemon's contact moves ignore a target's protection and deal 1/4 the usual damage.
